utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right , well the place was closed . I will just copy it later .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Or not . Uh , Rach , why do not you just move in with me ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Rach , why do not you just move in with me ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ... no ... no ... no ... no ... no ... no ... no ... It is okay , I mean I ... look Rach , I know I scared you off with that whole Naked Thursday thing , but we do not have to do that !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , it would be easier to move just right across the hall . Wait a minute , unless you are thinking about Naked Wednesday .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Thursday clearly not good for you , pick a day !

emotion_cause.span: 6_Thursday clearly not good for you , pick a day !
